title.en: China-to-Brunei Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入文莱：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入汶萊：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Brunei DES (Department of Electrical Services) grid-connection requirements, NSC (National Standards Centre) conformity context, AEMTS (Energy Department, Ministry of Energy) regulatory context, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 EMC, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, and tropical high-humidity climate considerations — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines. NOTE: Brunei's published PV-specific grid interconnection code is limited; exporters must confirm current DES technical requirements directly.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与文莱DES（电力服务部）并网要求、NSC（国家标准中心）合格评定背景、AEMTS（能源部，能源部门）监管背景、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数及热带高湿气候考量——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。注：文莱已发布的光伏专项并网规范较为有限，出口商须直接向DES确认现行技术要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與汶萊DES（電力服務部）併網要求、NSC（國家標準中心）合格評定背景、AEMTS（能源部，能源部門）監管背景、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數及熱帶高濕氣候考量——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。注：汶萊已發佈的光伏專項併網規範較為有限，出口商須直接向DES確認現行技術要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DES connection approval, NSC conformity scope determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Brunei's published PV-specific interconnection requirements are limited and may be supplemented by project-level DES technical conditions not available publicly. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current DES technical requirements, NSC conformity obligations, and AEMTS energy sector policies with qualified professionals and directly with the Department of Electrical Services, Brunei before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DES接入批准、NSC合格评定范围裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。文莱已发布的光伏专项互联要求较为有限，可能由非公开的项目级DES技术条件补充。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士并直接向文莱电力服务部核验现行DES技术要求、NSC合格评定义务及AEMTS能源部门政策。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DES接入批准、NSC合格評定範圍裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。汶萊已發佈的光伏專項互聯要求較為有限，可能由非公開的項目級DES技術條件補充。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士並直接向汶萊電力服務部核驗現行DES技術要求、NSC合格評定義務及AEMTS能源部門政策。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Brunei, the key practical gaps are: (1) Brunei's published PV-specific grid interconnection code is limited — exporters must obtain DES (Department of Electrical Services) connection approval and confirm inverter technical requirements directly with DES before shipment; (2) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is expected for grid-connected inverters; (3) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance is a standard requirement for grid-tied PV inverters operating on Brunei's 50 Hz grid; (4) IEC 62920 EMC evidence is expected by project engineers and DES technical review; (5) inverter firmware must be validated for Brunei's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not China's 220/380 V settings; and (6) tropical high-humidity climate (Brunei's equatorial climate) requires attention to IP rating and derating documentation. China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines are not accepted as equivalent to IEC-referenced requirements and do not substitute for DES connection approval.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口文莱时，主要实际差距包括：（1）文莱已发布的光伏专项并网规范较为有限——出口商须在出货前直接向DES（电力服务部）取得并网批准，并确认逆变器技术要求；（2）并网逆变器通常需要来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（3）IEC 62116防孤岛合规是在文莱50 Hz电网运行的并网光伏逆变器的标准要求；（4）项目工程师和DES技术审查预期提供IEC 62920 EMC证据；（5）逆变器固件须针对文莱230/400 V、50 Hz电网进行验证，而非中国220/380 V参数；（6）热带高湿气候（文莱赤道气候）要求关注IP等级和降额文件。中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准不被视为等同于IEC引用要求，不能替代DES并网批准。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口汶萊時，主要實際差距包括：（1）汶萊已發佈的光伏專項併網規範較為有限——出口商須在出貨前直接向DES（電力服務部）取得併網批准，並確認逆變器技術要求；（2）併網逆變器通常需要來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（3）IEC 62116防孤島合規是在汶萊50 Hz電網運行的併網光伏逆變器的標準要求；（4）項目工程師和DES技術審查預期提供IEC 62920 EMC證據；（5）逆變器韌體須針對汶萊230/400 V、50 Hz電網進行驗證，而非中國220/380 V參數；（6）熱帶高濕氣候（汶萊赤道氣候）要求關注IP等級和降額文件。中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準不被視為等同於IEC引用要求，不能替代DES併網批准。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
